Class Vector2

java.lang.Object
org.obsidium.geometry.Vector2
public class Vector2 extends Object
A class that can be instantiated to hold 2 integers that represent the coordinates x and y.
Since:
1.0

      public int x

  • Constructor Details

    • Vector2

      public Vector2(int x, int y)
      The constructor of the Vector2 class that stores the x and y coordinates in integer form.
      Parameters:
      x - the x-coordinate that needs to be stored
      y - the y-coordinate that needs to be stored
      Since:
      1.0

  • Method Details

    • plus

      public Vector2 plus(Vector2 other)
      This method adds the 2 specified vectors and returns the result.
      Parameters:
      other - the second vector in the addition
      Returns:
      the sum of the 2 vectors
      Since:
      1.0

    • minus

      public Vector2 minus(Vector2 other)
      This method subtracts the 2 specified vectors and returns the result.
      Parameters:
      other - the second vector in the subtracts
      Returns:
      the difference of the 2 vectors
      Since:
      1.0

    • times

      public Vector2 times(Vector2 other)
      This method multiplies the 2 specified vectors and returns the result.
      Parameters:
      other - the second vector in the multiplication
      Returns:
      the procuct of the 2 vectors
      Since:
      1.0

    • dot

      public static int dot(Vector2 firstVector2, Vector2 secondVector2)
      Computes the dot product of this vector and the specified vector.
      Parameters:
      firstVector2 - the firs vector
      secondVector2 - the second vector
      Returns:
      the scalar product of the 2 vectors
      Since:
      1.0
